basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Young Professional and Field Assistant Posts
basic_details.post_name: Young Professional-II, Young Professional-I and Field Assistant
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR-IARI) Young Professional-II, Young Professional-I and Field Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ICAR-IARI. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation is applicable as per rules: Five years for SC/ST/Women and three years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree (First class) in Agronomy, B.Sc. (Ag) (First class), 10th class passed
qualification.details: Young Professional-II: Master's degree (First class) in Agronomy from a recognized university / institution. Field Assistant: 10th class passed. Young Professional-I: B.Sc. (Ag) (First class).

salary_details.details: Young Professional-II: Rs. 42,000/- consolidated (Per month fixed) Field Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per month fixed Young Professional-I: Rs. 30,000/- consolidated (Per month fixed)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICAR-IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICAR-IARI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: ICAR-IARI is recruiting for three posts: Young Professional-II, Young Professional-I, and Field Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Young Professional-II?
faq.answer: For the Young Professional-II post, candidates must possess a Master's degree (First class) in Agronomy from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 42,000/- per month, with specific amounts for each post: Young Professional-II (Rs. 42,000/-), Field Assistant (Rs. 20,000/-), and Young Professional-I (Rs. 30,000/-).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application screening followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: five years for SC/ST/Women candidates and three years for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of ICAR-IARI.

faq.question: Q9. Where is ICAR-IARI located?
faq.answer: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute is located in New Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for these posts in the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026.
